$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for merge-agent responses (Story 7.2-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; extra fields allowed for forward-compat.
title: MergeAgentResponse
description: Structured result returned by a merge agent dispatched by the orchestrator.

pr_number.description: Pull request number that was merged.

merge_sha.description: SHA of the resulting merge commit.

merged_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the merge landed.
